title: Distant New Dawn
body:
# 🌄 Distance Horizon

**Explore Further. See More. Play Smoother.**

**Distance Horizon** is a **performance-optimized Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.21.5** that enables **extremely long render distances** through **Distant Horizons**, and enhances your gameplay with smart CPU/RAM optimizations, terrain beautification, and visual polish — all without breaking your framerate.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1763ba7dc567e66348ed73a4c18c85af73981a4_0.webp)

---

## 🚀 Key Features

- **🧠 Distant Horizons** – See up to **256+ chunks away** using LOD terrain generation
- **🌄 Rethinking Voxels (Renderer)** – Modern renderer compatible with Distant Horizons and improved visuals
- **⚙️ Iris + Sodium + Lithium + FerriteCore + C2ME + Noisium** – Best-in-class performance mods
- **🪄 Continuity** – Seamless connected textures & emissives
- **🔊 Sound Physics Remastered** – Realistic audio bounce, reverb & occlusion
- **🧱 Tectonic** – Gorgeous terrain generation made for massive draw distances

---

## 🧪 System Requirements

> Based on real-world testing and data from the Distant Horizons 2.3 update and top packs

| RAM Allocated | Recommended Usage                                |
|---------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| 2GB           | ❌ Not Supported – Will crash                    |
| 4GB           | ⚠️ Minimum – Light gameplay only (<256 chunks)  |
| 6GB           | ✅ Recommended – Ideal for 256–320 chunk LOD     |
| 10GB+         | 🧪 Heavy – Only for advanced worldgen combos     |

- **Keep vanilla render distance under 16** for best results
- **Crank “CPU Load” to `I Paid For The Whole CPU` in DH config** when pre-generating LODs
- **Use AFK chunk generation mode** to pre-load far terrain, then drop to low-impact mode for normal play

---

## 🌍 Terrain Mods You’ll Love

> Preselected for stunning large-scale visuals with Distant Horizons compatibility

- **Tectonic** – Big mountains, smooth valleys, and smart biome blending
- **Lithostitched + Continents + Terralith-style patches** – Natural transitions with a performance edge
- **William Wyther's (optional)** – Drop-in for beautiful world aesthetics if desired

---

## 🧠 Tips & Fixes from Experience

- **Pregeneration takes time.** LOD chunks are lower quality but still CPU-heavy.
- **Batching errors in console?** Safe to ignore – they’re just loading timeouts.
- **Don’t overload chunks.** Anything beyond 320 LOD chunks can cause major lag or RAM issues.
- **Use “Minimal” or “Low Impact” mode after pregeneration** to avoid stutter.

---

## ✅ Compatible & Stable

- Supports **Minecraft 1.21.5**
- Runs on **Fabric Loader**
- Client-side only — works in **singleplayer** and on **servers running Distant Horizons 2.3+**
- **DOES NOT use OptiFine**, ensuring cleaner performance and mod compatibility

---

> ⚠️ This pack does **not** include BSL, Complementary, Bliss, or Photon shaders. You are free to install your own shaders compatible with Iris + DH.

---

## 🧰 Included Mods (Core Selection)

1. **Distant Horizons**
2. **Sodium**
3. **Iris Shaders**
4. **Lithium**
5. **FerriteCore**
6. **C2ME**
7. **Noisium**
8. **Continuity**
9. **Sound Physics Remastered**
10. **Mod Menu & Dependencies**
11. **Rethinking Voxels**
12. **Tectonic**
13. **Memory Leak Fixes & Fastloaders**

---

## 🧪 Real-World Experience

- Used by players to reach 256–320+ chunk view distances
- Based on best practices from packs with **over 200K downloads**
- Designed with minimal bloat for smooth operation on mid-range setups
- AFK preloading and CPU tuning highly recommended for ultra-far exploration

---

> See the world the way it was meant to be seen. Massive, detailed, and limitless.  
> **Distance Horizon** turns your horizon from a foggy wall into a breathtaking landscape.
